/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X:RAVI KRISHNANEY APPEARING FOR THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OFFICE UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF ADA SUTTON,//WIT SWORN:OFFICER LEONARD CALDERA AND OFFICER LAWRENCE MCDEVITT/EXHM:1- EVIDENCE ENVELOPE; 1A- BAGGIE WITH 1 GREEN PILL; 1B- BAGGIE WITH 1GREEN PILLMARKED #80; 1C- BAGGIE WITH 2 YELLOW PILLS; 1D- SFPD CRIME LAB ANALYSIS FORM/X:PC 1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/X:  MOTION GRANTED AS TOCOUNT(S) 1/   /X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/

/CAL:TO SET/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 02-05-09,/X: BAIL SET AT $25,000/
